description.message: Use Twitch emotes (including 7TV, FFZ, and BTTV) on Boosty.
description.description: The main description of the extension shown in the browser web store and extensions manager

copied.description: Tooltip or toast notification text shown when an item is copied to the clipboard

search_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for search input fields

auth_button.description: Text on the main authentication button

auth_description.message: Twitch, 7TV, FrankerFaceZ, and BetterTTV emotes on Boosty.
auth_description.description: Brief description of the extension below the title on the auth page

auth_why_login_title.description: Title of the block explaining the reason for authorization

auth_why_login_text.message: Authorization works purely as a gateway. We need a basic access token so the extension can send requests to the Twitch API and fetch emote lists.
auth_why_login_text.description: Main text explaining the API mechanism and token usage

auth_any_account_text.message: Absolutely any account will work — the extension only needs access to public data, no personal info is collected.
auth_any_account_text.description: Reassurance text regarding data safety and privacy

header_settings.description: Title for the settings button/page in the header

header_global_emotes.description: Title for the global emotes section in the header

header_logout.description: Title for the logout button in the header

header_back_button.description: Text for the back navigation button

home_page_delete_user_button_title.description: Tooltip for the button used to remove a linked streamer from the list

alerts_twitch_token_expired.message: Your Twitch token has expired. Twitch emotes cannot be updated until the token is renewed. Please log in again.
alerts_twitch_token_expired.description: Alert message shown when the Twitch API access token is no longer valid

add_user_add_button.description: Text on the button to confirm adding a new user

add_user_twitch_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the input field where the user types a Twitch channel name

add_user_boosty_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the input field where the user types a Boosty channel name

add_user_empty_inputs_error.message: All fields must be filled in
add_user_empty_inputs_error.description: Error message shown when a required form field is left empty

add_user_user_does_not_exist.message: Twitch user @$USER$ not found. The account might be deleted or banned.
add_user_user_does_not_exist.description: Error message when the Twitch API cannot find the requested user

add_user_twitch_user_already_exists.message: Twitch user @$TWITCH_USER$ is already linked to Boosty user @$BOOSTY_USER$
add_user_twitch_user_already_exists.description: Error message when attempting to add a Twitch user that is already in the database

add_user_boosty_user_already_exists.message: Boosty user @$BOOSTY_USER$ is already linked to Twitch user @$TWITCH_USER$
add_user_boosty_user_already_exists.description: Error message when attempting to assign a Boosty user that is already linked to another Twitch account

add_user_unknown_error.description: Generic fallback error message for unexpected failures

emote_stats_total_emotes.description: Label for the total count of emotes for a specific user

emote_stats_updated_at.description: Label indicating the last time the emote list was fetched

emote_set_empty.description: Placeholder text shown when a user or provider has no emotes available

emote_global_set_title.description: Title for the section containing globally available emotes from providers

emote_channel_set_title.description: Title for the section containing emotes specific to a certain channel

favorite_tab_title.description: Title of the tab containing the user's favorite emotes

settings_appearance_title.description: Title for the visual settings section

settings_theme_label.description: Label for the color theme selection dropdown

settings_theme_auto.description: Option to sync the extension theme with the OS/browser settings

settings_theme_light.description: Option for the light color theme

settings_theme_dark.description: Option for the dark color theme

settings_autocompletion_title.description: Title for the chat autocompletion settings section

settings_use_tab_autocompletion_label.description: Label for the toggle enabling emote completion via the Tab key

settings_use_tab_autocompletion_desc.message: Opens the emote autocomplete menu for the current word when Tab is pressed
settings_use_tab_autocompletion_desc.description: Detailed description of the Tab autocompletion feature

settings_use_colon_autocompletion_label.description: Label for the toggle enabling emote completion via the colon prefix

settings_use_colon_autocompletion_desc.message: Opens the emote autocomplete menu when typing a colon followed by text (e.g., :kappa...)
settings_use_colon_autocompletion_desc.description: Detailed description of the colon autocompletion feature

settings_limit_label.description: Label for the input controlling the maximum number of autocomplete suggestions

settings_limit_desc.message: Maximum number of emotes shown in the autocomplete list
settings_limit_desc.description: Detailed description of the suggestions limit setting

settings_match_type_label.description: Label for selecting how the typed text matches emote names

settings_match_type_desc.message: How emotes are matched against your input
settings_match_type_desc.description: Detailed description of the match type setting

settings_match_type_starts_with.description: Option where the emote name must begin with the typed text

settings_match_type_contains.description: Option where the emote name can contain the typed text anywhere

settings_prioritize_prefix_matched_emote.description: Label for the toggle that sorts strict prefix matches higher in results

settings_prioritize_prefix_matched_emote.message: Emotes starting with your input appear higher in the list
settings_prioritize_prefix_matched_emote.description: Detailed description of the prefix prioritization setting

settings_prioritize_favorite_emotes_labe.description: Label for the toggle that sorts favorite emotes higher in results

settings_prioritize_favorite_emotes_desc.message: Favorite emotes always appear at the top of the list
settings_prioritize_favorite_emotes_desc.description: Detailed description of the favorite prioritization setting

settings_sort_by_priority_label.description: Label for the toggle that sorts emotes based on the provider hierarchy

settings_sort_by_priority_desc.message: Sort results by the provider order defined below
settings_sort_by_priority_desc.description: Detailed description of the provider priority sorting setting

tooltip_global_emote_title.description: Tooltip indicating that an emote is globally available on the platform

tooltip_channel_emote_title.description: Tooltip indicating that an emote is specific to a certain channel

tooltip_overlay_emote_title.description: Tooltip indicating that an emote is a zero-width overlay (e.g., 7TV overlays)

tooltip_modifier_emote_title.description: Tooltip indicating that an emote applies a visual modifier (e.g., FFZ modifiers)

tooltip_favorite_emote_title.description: Tooltip for the button/icon used to mark an emote as favorite
